message:
fix: resolve clippy warnings across frankenterm-core

- Remove 5 needless return statements in cfg-gated feature branches
  (ipc.rs, native_events.rs, vendored/mux_client.rs)
- Add Eq derives to ReleaseGateCheck, ReleaseGateReport, LeakEvidenceStatus
- Use mul_add for EWMA update in restart_scheduler
- Fix Cx.inner private field access in runtime_compat tests (use
  logical_now() functional check instead of Arc::ptr_eq)
- Accept spawn_with_cx generic API changes from concurrent agent

Reduces clippy warnings from 16 to 6 (remaining are expected dead_code
for feature-gated functions).

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
